title: Sour Chewy Irish Chinese Cabbage Soup
description: This vegan-friendly sour and chewy Irish-style cabbage soup is energizing and perfect for a quick lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: Spices (cayenne, mustard seeds, fenugreek)
ingredients.notes: For a bit of spice and depth of flavor

instructions: Clean and thinly slice the Chinese cabbage. Chop the onion into small pieces.
Heat a pan with some coconut oil over medium heat, add onions and sauté until they are soft and translucent.
Add minced garlic to the pan and cook for another minute or so until fragrant.
Stir in tomato puree, spices (cayenne, mustard seeds, fenugreek), salt, vegan stock cube/powder, water/vegetable stock, and coconut milk. Bring to a simmer.
Add sliced cabbage to the pot, reduce heat to low, cover with a lid, and let it cook for about 20 minutes until cabbage is tender.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh coriander leaves.
